title: Bridge Signature Stream Record
description: One record in the bridge-local signature stream (signatures.jsonl). Each record corresponds to one spatial cell in the 2D field. This is a bridge-local schema; it does NOT use TopoStream token_types or vortex charges.

is_low_signal.description: True if vector magnitude < low_signal_threshold AND not solid

theta_bridge.description: atan2(v, u) in radians, in (-pi, pi]. Null if is_solid or is_low_signal.

magnitude.description: sqrt(u^2 + v^2) — always present even for solid/low-signal pixels

scalar.description: Optional scalar field value at this pixel. Null if no scalar provided.
